texto: The stuff that I find really intriguing is always how do ordinary people behave in extraordinary circumstances. And that's why we have a lot of cop shows and lawyer shows and medical shows is that you're looking for situations that just always heighten the stakes.
explicacao: Citação de Zeljko Ivanek sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The stuff that I find really intriguing is always how do ordinary people behave in extraordinary …” articula reflexao, lawyer, people em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como people e looking.
